info.name: CID Watch API
info.description: API Collection for CID Watch - Aggregator for Drama, Anime, Movies, and Manga

request.description: Get all homepage data with cache (2 days)
Check API health status
Login user and set session cookie
Register new user
Get API token for authenticated requests (expires in 1 hour)
Logout user and clear session (requires auth session)
Get all users list (requires auth session)
Update user data (requires auth session)
Delete user (requires auth session)
Update user password (requires auth session)
Get list of available drama providers
Get cache statistics (debug)
Combined trending recommendations from Dramabox and Melolo. Cache: 5 minutes.
Combined new releases from both providers. Cache: 5 minutes.
Search across both Dramabox and Melolo. Results not shuffled. Cache: 5 minutes.
VIP content from Dramabox only. Cache: 1 hour.
List all genres from Dramabox. Cache: 1 hour.
Get dramas by genre ID. Cache: 5 minutes.
Get drama details with chapter list. No cache.
Get stream URL for a specific chapter. Uses chapterId to find stream. No cache.
Batch download all chapters with stream URLs. Dramabox only. May take longer. No cache.
Get list of available anime providers
Get list of available movie providers
Get list of available manga providers
Interactive API documentation using Scalar
OpenAPI/Swagger specification JSON
